name: rei-heat-blooms
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman's face, ice-blue eyes fluttering, pupils dilating. Lips parting with audible breath. Warmth spreading visible as deep blush on pale cheeks, down her neck. Collar loosened from tension. Something melting. Surrendering. Soft warm amber lighting conquering the blue. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: earring-cracks
prompt: Close-up on silver-haired woman's ear and jaw. Crystalline earring visible, frost on its surface beginning to melt into droplets. Blush creeping up her neck. Warmth overtaking cold. Soft amber light mixing with blue. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-there-you-are
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man in dim storage room, amber eyes soft and warm, thumb tracing unseen cheekbone. Tender expression beneath the heat. Concrete wall behind. Intimate. Warm amber lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-breaking
prompt: Close-up. Silver-haired woman, expression cracked open — vulnerable, lost, feeling. Ice-blue eyes glistening. Voice breaking. Warmth on her cheeks from his hands. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Rei
dialogue.text: I don't— I don't know what's happening.
